name: MCV_VP1_capsid
description: MCV VP1 major capsid protein, ~360 aa, forming 72 pentamers on a T=7d icosahedral capsid. Carries the receptor-binding loops (BC, DE, EF, HI loops on the outer surface) that determine host-cell tropism — sialic-acid-linked glycans for BKV/JCV (GD1a, GD3, GT1b respectively), MCV uses sulfated glycosaminoglycans plus sialylated co-receptors. VP1 is the major target of serological assays; cross-reactivity between polyomavirus serotypes is partial, so quantitative serology requires multi-VP1 panels.
